createSubsCompleteModal.title: Create Subs Complete
createSubsCompleteModal.body: Your subtitle generation is finished! Please check the timeline. If you have any questions, refer to the guides below or contact our support team.

selectSRTInfoModal.title: How to select an SRT?
selectSRTInfoModal.body:
You can do this in 3 ways:
1. Select the file using the SRT button.
2. Drag and drop the file from Finder/Explorer.
3. Type the file path into the text box.

Note: SRT must follow our documentation for accurate timing.

mogrtInfoModal.title: How to select a Mogrt?
mogrtInfoModal.body:
You can do this in 3 ways:
1. Select the file using the Mogrt button.
2. Drag and drop the file from Finder/Explorer.
3. Type the file path into the text box.

Note: Mogrts must be created following our documentation.

charactersPerMogrtInfoModal.title: What is this setting?
charactersPerMogrtInfoModal.body:
This changes the length of each individual phrase. The SRT is split based on this estimated count.

Recommendations:
- 1-25: 9x16 (Vertical)
- 25-50: 1x1 (Square)
- 50-100: 16x9 (Widescreen)

syncAllInfoModal.title: What does Sync All do?
syncAllInfoModal.body: Syncs text, style, and motion properties (PSR) to your selection. Place the playhead over your 'Master' clip first.

syncTextInfoModal.title: Syncing Text Properties
syncTextInfoModal.body: Only syncs properties under 'Text Input (P)'. This includes font, size, and source text if on the same track.

syncStyleInfoModal.title: Syncing Stylistic Choices
syncStyleInfoModal.body: Syncs colors, animations, and shadows (everything without a (P) tag).

syncPSRInfoModal.title: Syncing Position, Scale, Rotation
syncPSRInfoModal.body: Syncs the Premiere 'Effect Controls' motion settings across all selected clips.

extensionUnverifiedModal.title: License Required
extensionUnverifiedModal.body: We couldn't verify your extension. Please check your license or contact BloomX support to resolve this.

noClipsSelectedModal.title: Action Required
noClipsSelectedModal.body: You haven't selected any clips. Please select the clips or phrases you want to process and try again.

noActiveSequenceModal.title: Sequence Not Found
noActiveSequenceModal.body: You don't seem to have an active sequence selected. Please open a sequence in Premiere Pro and try again.

frameRatesNotEqualModal.title: Mismatch Error
frameRatesNotEqualModal.body: Your sequence and Mogrt frame rates do not match. Please choose a Mogrt that matches your sequence settings (e.g., 23.976, 25, 29.97).

doubleLinedSRTModal.title: Format Error
doubleLinedSRTModal.body: freeXan Caption requires a single-lined SRT. Your file seems to have multiple lines per entry. Please re-export your SRT from Premiere's Text panel as a single-line format.
